items.title: Neural network training
items.description: Every weight and bias update in SGD, Adam and related optimizers uses gradients of the mini-batch loss with respect to parameters.

items.title: Hyperparameter tuning via gradients
items.description: When hyperparameters enter the training objective differentiably (e.g. meta-learning setups), gradients with respect to them guide outer-loop optimization.

items.title: Adversarial example crafting
items.description: The gradient of classification loss with respect to input pixels indicates how to perturb an image to increase misclassification locally.

items.title: Regularization and constraint handling
items.description: Penalty terms add their gradients to the total ∇L, biasing updates toward smaller norms or other preferred parameter regions.
